# Layers Factory
> India's trusted online store for premium marble temples, divine sculptures, and spiritual home decor.

## About
Layers Factory (layerfactory.in) is an Indian e-commerce store specialising in handcrafted marble temples (mandirs), divine deity sculptures (Ganesh, Lakshmi, Shiva, Durga, Krishna), and spiritual home decor. Every product is crafted with high-quality marble and shipped pan-India with care.

Founded by Atishay Jain. Brand: Layers Factory (layerfactory.in).

## What We Sell
- Marble home temples (mandirs) — wall-mounted, floor-standing, portable
- Marble deity sculptures — Ganesh, Lakshmi, Shiva, Durga, Krishna, Ram, Hanuman
- Spiritual home decor — diyas, incense holders, prayer accessories
- Pooja room accessories and gifts

## Why Customers Choose Layers Factory
- Premium handcrafted marble — not mass-produced resin or plastic
- Free shipping on orders above ₹499 (pan-India delivery)
- Secure payment via Razorpay (UPI, cards, net banking, COD)
- 7-day hassle-free returns
- Trusted by thousands of customers across India
